title: Bridgton Hub claims CSA Schools T20 title
description: OUDTSHOORN NEWS - The Bridgton Hub won the...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"OUDTSHOORN NEWS - The Bridgton Hub won the SWD edition of the Cricket South Africa Schools T20 title on Tuesday 5 November. The Bridgton Hub defeated the D’Almeida Hub from Mossel Bay by 60 runs in the final at the Recreation Ground.","html":"OUDTSHOORN NEWS - The Bridgton Hub won the SWD edition of the Cricket South Africa Schools T20 title on Tuesday 5 November. The Bridgton Hub defeated the D’Almeida Hub from Mossel Bay by 60 runs in the final at the Recreation Ground."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Bridgton, who batted first posted a competitive 156/8 in their allotted 20 overs. Wilrino Meyer (21) and Keano Coerecius (58 from 44 balls; 1x6, 5x4) added 59 runs for the second wicket while the partnership for the third wicket was 86 runs between Coerecius and Josh Karelse (51 from 39 balls; 1x6, 5x4)."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"In their pursuit, the D’Almeida Hub was restricted to 96 all out. For Bridgton Sherwin Plaatjies (2/3), Lastio Williams (3/4), and Jerwill van Wyngaardt (4/24) impressed with the ball. Joshua Rossouw produced an all-round performance for D’Almeide as he picked up 4/22 with the ball and scored 24 (from 26 balls; 1x6, 1x4) with the bat.","html":"In their pursuit, the D’Almeida Hub was restricted to 96 all out. For Bridgton Sherwin Plaatjies (2/3), Lastio Williams (3/4), and Jerwill van Wyngaardt (4/24) impressed with the ball. Joshua Rossouw produced an all-round performance for D’Almeide as he picked up 4/22 with the ball and scored 24 (from 26 balls; 1x6, 1x4) with the bat."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Keano Coerecius, the captain of the Bridgton Hub receives the trophy as tournament winners from Johan Bruiners (Eden Schools Cricket Executive Committee member).","html":"Keano Coerecius, the captain of the Bridgton Hub receives the trophy as tournament winners from Johan Bruiners (Eden Schools Cricket Executive Committee member)."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The summarised scorecard is:","html":"The summarised scorecard is:"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Bridgton Hub vs D’Almeida Hub","html":"Bridgton Hub vs D’Almeida Hub"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Bridgton Hub 156/8 (Wilveno Meyer 21, Keano Coerecius 58, Josh Karelse 51, Joshua Rossouw 4/22, Keano Witbooi 3/22).","html":"Bridgton Hub 156/8 (Wilveno Meyer 21, Keano Coerecius 58, Josh Karelse 51, Joshua Rossouw 4/22, Keano Witbooi 3/22)."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"D’Almeida Hub 96 all out (Joshua Rossow 24, Sherwin Plaatjies 2/3, Lastio Williams 3/4, Jerwill van Wyngaardt 4/24) Bridgton Hub won by 60 runs.","html":"D’Almeida Hub 96 all out (Joshua Rossow 24, Sherwin Plaatjies 2/3, Lastio Williams 3/4, Jerwill van Wyngaardt 4/24) Bridgton Hub won by 60 runs."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
